citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany the APHIS Official during the inspection process at 11:30am on
Wednesday, March 4, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee, and a family member called the licensee at
work, but the licensee was unable to leave to facilitate the inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals,
and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and
may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany the APHIS Official during the inspection process at 11:30am on 
Wednesday, March 4, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee, and a family member called the licensee at 
work, but the licensee was unable to leave to facilitate the inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, 
and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and 
may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
